name: Jalapeno Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lime juice, water, and minced garlic in a bowl to create a marinade.
2. Place the boneless chicken breasts in the marinade, ensuring they are well-coated.
3. Cover the chicken and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 4 hours for more flavor.
4. Preheat your grill or broiler.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
6. Grill or broil the chicken until it is cooked through and lightly browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
7. Slice the grilled chicken thinly against the grain.
8. Serve the sliced chicken in warm flour tortillas topped with lettuce, green onions, tomatoes, ripe olives, and any other desired ingredients. Enjoy your fajitas!
